steps.title: Calculate 23% of 100
steps.content: To find 23% of 100, convert the percentage to decimal form: $23\% = 0.23$. Multiply this by 100: $0.23 \times 100 = 23$. That matches choice A — A is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice A is correct. $23%$ of $100$ can be calculated by multiplying $\frac{23}{100}$ by $100$, which yields $\left(\frac{23}{100}\right)100$, or $23$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B is incorrect. This is $46%$, not $23%$, of $100$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C is incorrect. This is $23%$ less than $100$, not $23%$ of $100$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice D is incorrect. This is $23%$ greater than $100$, not $23%$ of $100$.
